name: Grimbush Gizzlethorn
sd_appearance: A wiry, hunchbacked goblin of barely 3 feet stands against the dimly lit Undercity alley, his large bat-like ears twitching as he scans the shadows. His patchwork coat, a vibrant blend of fabrics from countless worlds, billows slightly in the cold breeze. A red armband, the mark of the Patchwork Saints, is visible on his forearm. He wears a worn-but-loved pair of boots, the soles worn thin from years of navigating the treacherous city. A chain mail vest and a crossbow rest easy on his lean frame, while a warhammer leans against the nearby wall. A single yellow eye gleams in the darkness, a testament to Grimbush's unwavering vigilance.
faction_visual: patchwork cloth of many fabrics, red armband, worn-but-loved boots, medicinal pouch
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
